name: Quick-Fried Beef with Oyster Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into small, thin slices and rub with salt and 1/2 tablespoon of oil.
2. Mix soy sauce, cornstarch, water, sherry, and stock in a bowl until well blended.
3. Finely chop the ginger root.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a frying pan. When hot, add beef and spread pieces out.
5. Stir-fry over high heat for 1 minute.
6. Add ginger, followed by oyster sauce and sugar; continue stir-frying for 30 seconds.
7. Pour in the sauce mixture from the bowl and stir-fry over high heat for an additional minute.
8. Serve immediately on a well-heated dish.
This mixture of seafood flavor with meat is a common Cantonese practice enjoyed most in southern China, but not always accepted elsewhere.
